title: oenothera capillifolia subsp. berlandieri
intro: Oenothera capillifolia subsp. berlandieri, also known as evening primrose, is a flowering plant native to North America. It is a species of plant that has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of evening primrose include reducing symptoms of menopause, improving skin health, and alleviating conditions such as eczema and multiple sclerosis. Evening primrose oil is commonly prepared through cold-pressing of the seeds, which can be used in herbal preparations such as capsules, creams, and tinctures.
